case_title: SAMSON, WILFREDO vs. DAQUIOAG, ROLAND H. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, CALENDAR OF JAN-19-1995, DENIED 5 DAYS TO PLEAD.

FILE RETURNED TO FILINGS AFTER 2/22/95 SETT. CONF; FILE HAS BEEN MISSING SINCE THAT DATE. JUDGMENT ENTERED USING CT. MINUTES PER JUDGE WICK TO AVOID FURTHER DELAY. MR. MENDEZ NOT ATTY. OF RECORD. JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT. AT ADDRESS LISTED IN REGISTER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAQUIOAG, DOLORES G. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2 SANTA BARBARA ST., LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS. TO PAY TO MR. MENDEZ'S OFFICE $1000.00 TO BE HELD AS SECURITY FOR ANY DAMAGES; DEFTS. WILL ALLOW VIDEO TAPING OF PREMISES AND ANY DAMAGES WHICH SHALL THEREAFTER OCCUR SHALL BE PAID FROM DEPOSIT BY MR. MENDEZ. (MR. MENDEZ NOT ATTY. OF RECORD AS OF 5/2/95); SEE JUDGMENT.
